steps.t: The gate to the goblin-village lies to the south-east of Echad Idhrenfair. Idhrenfair has asked you to scout the goblin-village you discovered while p…
The goblin-village lies to the south-east of Echad Idhrenfair. You should continue deeper into the goblin-village.
The goblin-village lies to the south-east of Echad Idhrenfair. You should continue deeper into the goblin-village.
The goblin-village lies to the south-east of Echad Idhrenfair. You should continue deeper into the goblin-village.
Idhrenfair is at Echad Idhrenfair, north-west of the goblin-village. You should return to Idhrenfair with tidings of what you have learned.
